entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal grain crop used in the study.

entities.name: SPOTTED STEMBORER
entities.description: A pest insect, Chilo partellus (Swinhoe), that damages sorghum.

entities.name: CHILO PARTELLUS
entities.description: The scientific name for the spotted stemborer.

entities.name: LEAF DAMAGE
entities.description: Damage observed on the leaves of sorghum plants.

entities.name: DEADHEART FORMATION
entities.description: A condition where the central growing point of the sorghum plant dies.

entities.name: STEM TUNNELLING
entities.description: Damage caused by the stemborer boring into the sorghum stem.

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: The effect of the host plant on insect survival and development.

entities.name: TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand insect damage.

entities.name: RECOVERY RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to recover from insect damage.

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL PLANT LOSS INDEX
entities.description: A selection index used to assess plant loss due to stress.

entities.name: FPLI
entities.description: Abbreviation for Functional Plant Loss Index.

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS INDEX
entities.description: A selection index used to assess antibiosis.

entities.name: ABI
entities.description: Abbreviation for Antibiosis Index.

entities.name: MEAN PRODUCTIVITY INDEX
entities.description: A selection index used to assess mean productivity.

entities.name: MPI
entities.description: Abbreviation for Mean Productivity Index.

entities.name: MEAN RELATIVE PERFORMANCE
entities.description: A selection index used to assess relative performance.

entities.name: MRP
entities.description: Abbreviation for Mean Relative Performance.

entities.name: RELATIVE EFFICIENCY INDEX
entities.description: A selection index used to assess relative efficiency.

entities.name: REI
entities.description: Abbreviation for Relative Efficiency Index.

entities.name: TOLERANCE INDEX
entities.description: A selection index used to assess tolerance.

entities.name: TOL
entities.description: Abbreviation for Tolerance Index.

entities.name: FISCHER'S AND MAURER'S STRESS SUSCEPTIBILITY INDEX
entities.description: A selection index used to assess stress susceptibility.

entities.name: FMSSI
entities.description: Abbreviation for Fischer's and Maurer's Stress Susceptibility Index.

entities.name: FERNANDEZ STRESS TOLERANCE INDEX
entities.description: A selection index used to assess stress tolerance.

entities.name: FSTI
entities.description: Abbreviation for Fernandez Stress Tolerance Index.

entities.name: GEOMETRIC MEAN PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: A selection index used to assess geometric mean productivity.

entities.name: GMP
entities.description: Abbreviation for Geometric Mean Productivity.

entities.name: SCHNEIDER'S STRESS SEVERITY INDEX
entities.description: A selection index used to assess stress severity.

entities.name: SSSI
entities.description: Abbreviation for Schneider's Stress Severity Index.

entities.name: GRAIN YIELD
entities.description: The yield of grain from the sorghum plants.

entities.name: BORER-INFESTED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Conditions where sorghum plants are infested with stemborers.

entities.name: BORER-UNINFESTED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Conditions where sorghum plants are not infested with stemborers.

entities.name: ADAPTATION
entities.description: The ability of the plant to adjust to borer infestation.
